title: Junior Manager Performance Marketing Europe
required_skills: Paid Social / Display / SEA campaign support (Google Ads, Meta, TikTok)
Campaign budget monitoring aligned to ROI targets
Daily monitoring and analysis of digital marketing campaign performance
Excel / PowerPoint; analytics/campaign platform experience beneficial
bonus_skills: Knowledge of new technologies and industry trends
matched_skills: Digital marketing campaign performance analysis (IPC: 4 B2B product launch campaigns, ROI tracking)
Multi-market campaign monitoring (GRG: EMEA + APAC markets, spend allocation recommendations)
Funnel and conversion analysis (Hapag-Lloyd, IPC lead pipeline)
Budget tracking and variance reporting (HSBC: USD 8M programme budget)
Data storytelling and structured performance reports for stakeholders
KOL performance tracking (Moli Media) — maps to influencer/creator campaign analytics
missing_skills: Paid Social / SEA hands-on campaign execution (Boru tracks and analyses campaigns; did not manage ad accounts directly)
Paid Social platforms (Meta Ads Manager, TikTok Ads) — operational execution gap
Herzogenaurach location (near Nuremberg) — requires on-site presence; remote options limited at PUMA
core_responsibilities: Support managing and optimising Paid Social, Display, SEA campaigns across European markets
Ensure channel budget alignment with ROI targets
Monitor and analyse digital marketing campaign performance daily
Assist in managing promotions; coordinate with agencies for execution
Create actionable insights from industry trends and technologies
recommended_emphasis: IPC: campaign ROI analytics (4.6M CNY revenue attribution) — strongest analogue to performance monitoring
GRG: multi-market campaign performance across EMEA/APAC with actionable spend recommendations
Moli Media: audience engagement and KOL performance tracking — maps to influencer/creator performance management
HSBC: budget tracking USD 8M — demonstrates ROI-target mindset
Position as 'analytics-first PM who adds measurement rigour to the campaign team'
Note: Herzogenaurach is a potential location barrier unless fully remote is possible

company_info.size_raw: PUMA Group — global sportswear brand, Herzogenaurach HQ
